user.title: Connect to Light Theme Library
user.description: Enter the local URL of your Light Theme Library add-on. The default (localhost:8099) works as long as the add-on is running and its port 8099 hasn't been changed. Update the add-on to at least v0.7.0 first — earlier versions don't publish this port and won't be reachable.

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the add-on at that URL. Make sure it's installed and running.

abort.already_configured: Light Theme Library is already set up.
